Human-readable raw row pointers (before 36-bit packing):
0, 17, 33, 50, 67, 73, 79, 83, 87, 95, 99, 107, 113, 118, 120, 125, 128, 132, 138, 145, 150, 153, 157, 161, 165, 170, 175, 180, 184, 188, 191, 195, 199, 204, 210, 214, 218, 222, 227, 230, 234, 238, 247, 251, 258, 261, 265, 265, 271, 279, 284, 292, 296, 299, 302, 304, 308, 311, 314, 317, 320, 322, 326, 329, 332, 336, 339, 341, 344, 347, 350, 352, 356, 359, 364, 368, 371, 373, 376, 379, 384, 387, 391, 394, 399, 403, 405, 409, 412, 415

Human-readable packed row pointers (36-bit integers):
